claims.statement: DET7-SW P0 resolved end-to-end: Pages workflow allowlist expanded from 5 files to the full PWA closure (8 root files + assets tree, git ls-tree inventory, node --check sw.js guard); sw.js v3 ships network-first core with skipWaiting/clients.claim, and its activate cleanup is PREFIX-SCOPED (deletes only abyssal-surge-* keys) because Cache Storage is origin-wide on github.io. E2E activation probe: a planted stale abyssal-surge-v1-sentinel was purged while a planted unrelated other-project-cache-probe survived; canonical sw.js registration restored and BUILD_TAG 'c007' stayed fresh across SW-controlled reloads. Live verification: Pages run success for 945f10a; curl 200 across the closure; live sw.js v3; live app.js BUILD_TAG c007.

DET7-CINE: five ffmpeg zoompan Ken Burns cinematics (960x540, 24fps, 6.0s, CRF 30, no audio) total 1.01MB (140-278KB each, under the 1.2MB/file and 6MB budgets); app.js overlay shows once per new encounter with skip isolation (capture-phase listeners), 7s hard timeout, immediate error fallback, reduced-motion skip, and no replay on retry/resume. E2E: all five overlays observed with correct per-stage src; skip keypress never leaked focus (3->3, 4->4, 5->5).

DET7-READ: lane-spawn-flash 250ms right-edge pulse fires on every hostile wave spawn (reduced-motion collapses to static tint); verified in Eng007 headless smoke (applied at spawn instant, cleared ~320ms).

DET7-APK: TWA kit delivered — apk/twa-manifest.json (bubblewrap-compatible), apk/assetlinks-template.json, apk/BUILD.md (79 lines incl. the origin-scoped verification subsection: assetlinks.json must publish at the jellyggumi.github.io HOST ROOT via the user-site repo or a custom domain; failure symptom = silent Custom Tabs fallback); icons icon-512/icon-192 PNGs rasterized and wired into manifest.json. No APK build claimed (no Android tooling in this environment).

DET7-QA: stage1-vertical-slice 2/2 (incl. updated closure pin test), playtest-5-stages PASS, browser E2E exit 0 unfiltered (5/5 VICTORY, cinematic+skip-isolation asserts, cycle-006 telegraph/dispel asserts retained, settlement, SW v3 activation-probe integration), capture-live exit 0 with cinematic dismissal, desktop+mobile PNGs refreshed.

Shared-worktree interference occurred three times (28 tracked records deleted; cycle-007 pre-commit governance files deleted; then the whole _workspace tree except the peer run deleted at ~17:00 KST, destroying this file's first uncommitted version). All tracked files restored and committed (945f10a, db58194); this record was rewritten. Deletion source unknown — verified not this session. Future cycles run in a dedicated git worktree; peer notified via shared-memory worktree-coop-protocol-20260716 v2. game-core.js remains byte-identical; no monetization/telemetry egress.

assumptions.statement: GitHub Pages CDN propagates within the verification window; curl 200 evidence reflects the deployed artifact rather than a stale edge cache.
assumptions.validation_boundary: If a user reports stale content after this deploy, re-verify with cache-busting query params before touching code.

assumptions.statement: The peer session (rts-hero-rework-20260716-a) respects the shared-memory co-op protocol until its P3 gate opens.
assumptions.validation_boundary: Before any future runtime commit, re-run git status and restore-audit; adopt the dedicated worktree for cycle 008 regardless.

next_action.scope: Move cycle-008 to a dedicated git worktree; then stage-depth work (per-stage foe behavior variety beyond tempo, boss telegraph patterns for stage 5) and APK build execution on Android-tooled hardware
prohibited_work: game-core.js reducer semantic changes without a new directive
